name: Loro Parque
description: Loro Parque (Spanish for "parrot park") or 'Loro Park' is a 135,000 m2 (13. 5 ha) zoo on the outskirts of Puerto de la Cruz on Tenerife, Spain where it houses an extensive and diverse reserve of animal and plant species.  The park was conceived as a paradise for parrots and has developed over the years into one of the biggest attractions of the Canary Islands, with over 40 million visitors.
